blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,991 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
